CustomField.description: Specific field API name to mask (e.g., SSN__c, CreditCardNumber__c). Required when MatchType=EXACT_FIELD. Each rule masks one field - create separate rules for multiple fields to allow individual enable/disable control.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Required for EXACT_FIELD match type. Enter field API name (e.g., SSN__c, Birthdate). Must also set SObject Type. Not used for REGEX_PATTERN.
CustomField.label: Field API Name
